subcodes.first_line: Many are the trees that shall be adorned with wondrous divine fruits, while We remain imprisoned beneath the dust [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسا اشجار که باثمار بدیعه الهیه تزیین یابد و ما در تحت تراب مسجون باشیم و چه
subcodes.subjects: @hypocrisy, @thankfulness; gratitude, @suffering and imprisonment, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
